{{Quote|Clone! Have you input the overnight batch of data yet?|Guris to Ordo Skirata|<ref name="tz" />}}
'''Guris''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanel]] who worked at the [[logistics center]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] located on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He took a rather superior attitude towards [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]], notably [[Corr Skirata|Corr]], and had a strained relationship with fellow GAR logistics worker [[Besany Wennen]].

{{Char-stub}}
